infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone to allow you to dictate journal entries via speech-to-text.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to convert your voice into text for your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires access to your photo library so you can select and attach photos or videos directly to your journal entries.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow UnderstandingMyChild to access the microphone.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow UnderstandingMyChild to recognize your voice.
